task_completion.description: Open the project specification sheet to find the required dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or document viewer is open showing the contents of 'gasket_specification.txt' on the desktop, displaying the required dimensions for the gasket.

task_completion.description: Open the starting gasket profile drawing in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application is open with the file 'gasket_frame_start.slvs' loaded, showing two concentric rectangles.

task_completion.description: Add dimensional constraints to the outer rectangle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace canvas shows explicit distance constraints added to the outer rectangle: 200.00 for the width and 150.00 for the height.

task_completion.description: Add dimensional constraints to the inner rectangle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace canvas shows explicit distance constraints added to the inner rectangle: 180.00 for the width and 130.00 for the height.

task_completion.description: Save the fully constrained drawing as a new file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace 'Save As' dialog is used to save the file as 'gasket_frame_constrained.slvs', or the SolveSpace window title updates to 'gasket_frame_constrained.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the SolveSpace GUI to add constraints.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking on lines/points and using SolveSpace constraint tools (like the dimension tool), rather than editing the .slvs file in a text editor or via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Constraints must be visually rendered by the CAD software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dimensions (200, 150, 180, 130) must appear as native SolveSpace dimension lines and text in the graphical viewport.

integrity.description: The agent must save the file from within the CAD software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the SolveSpace File > Save As menu, rather than just copying the start file in the terminal using 'cp' without making edits.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification file is located at /home/ga/Desktop/gasket_specification.txt. The required dimensions to be added in SolveSpace are: Outer width = 200mm, Outer height = 150mm, Inner width = 180mm, Inner height = 130mm. The final file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/gasket_frame_constrained.slvs.
